posts.title: The Best IPQualityScore Alternatives for Signup Verification (2026)
posts.excerpt: IPQualityScore is powerful, but its $99/month floor and platform breadth are more than most teams need. Here are the best IPQualityScore alternatives for signup and IP verification in 2026, compared honestly on price and fit.
posts.author: Rohit Kashyap

posts.title: Proxy Detection for SaaS Signups: A Practical Build Guide
posts.excerpt: Proxy-backed signups are how one attacker becomes a thousand fake accounts. Here's how to detect and score proxy traffic on a SaaS signup — the signals that matter, the code, the thresholds, and whether to build or buy.
posts.author: Rohit Kashyap

posts.title: The 2026 State of SaaS Signup Fraud Report
posts.excerpt: A directional, evidence-based look at what's actually attacking SaaS signup forms in 2026 — disposable emails, VPN traffic, AI-bot signups, Gmail alias abuse, and free-tier infrastructure mining. Drawn from Vouchley verification telemetry plus the broader industry data.
posts.author: Rohit Kashyap

posts.title: AI Bot Signups in 2026: Why Your Existing Defenses Are About to Fail
posts.excerpt: AI agents now mimic human signup behavior — typing cadence, mouse jitter, even dwell time — at a cost of cents per account. Here's why traditional bot defenses break against agentic signup fraud, and the new layered approach SaaS teams need.
posts.author: Rohit Kashyap

posts.title: How Fake Signups Quietly Destroy Your Email Deliverability
posts.excerpt: Fake signups don't just waste compute — they wreck your sender reputation. Here's how Gmail and Outlook decide whether your transactional email lands in the inbox or the spam folder, and how fake accounts move that needle in the wrong direction.
posts.author: Rohit Kashyap

posts.title: What Is a Signup Verification API? A Practical Guide for Product Teams
posts.excerpt: Signup verification APIs sit between your signup form and your database, scoring every new account in real time. Here's what they actually do, what they don't do, and how to evaluate one for your SaaS.
posts.author: Rohit Kashyap

posts.title: How to Prevent Free Trial Abuse in SaaS (Without Blocking Real Customers)
posts.excerpt: Free trial abuse silently burns your infrastructure and margins. Here's how to stop repeat signups and throwaway accounts in 2026 — without adding friction that hurts your conversion rate.
posts.author: Rohit Kashyap

posts.title: VPN and Proxy Detection for Signups: A Practical Guide for SaaS Teams
posts.excerpt: VPN signups aren't always bad — but they're disproportionately risky. Here's how to detect and risk-rank VPN, proxy, and Tor traffic on signup without losing legitimate privacy-conscious users.
posts.author: Rohit Kashyap

posts.title: Email Validation vs Signup Verification: What's the Difference and Why It Matters
posts.excerpt: Email validation checks if an address can receive mail. Signup verification asks whether the person behind that address is legitimate. Understand the difference and stop paying for the wrong problem.
posts.author: Rohit Kashyap

posts.title: How to Detect Fake Signups in Real Time: A Complete Guide for SaaS Teams
posts.excerpt: Fake signups are the silent tax on every growing SaaS. Here's how to detect and block them in real time — without adding friction for legitimate users.
posts.author: Rohit Kashyap

posts.title: Disposable Email Detection: What Works, What Doesn't, and Why It Matters
posts.excerpt: Disposable emails are the #1 indicator of low-intent signups. Here's a practical guide to detecting them — what works in 2026, what doesn't, and how to integrate detection into any stack.
posts.author: Rohit Kashyap

posts.title: Bot Signup Prevention: Why CAPTCHA Isn't Enough in 2026
posts.excerpt: CAPTCHA solved 2015. Bot farms solved CAPTCHA. Here's how modern SaaS teams actually stop bot signups — without adding friction for real users.
posts.author: Rohit Kashyap
